description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 9 hrs 44 mins coding, with a daily average of 2 hrs 24 mins. On GitHub, he opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, numbered #106 through #117. His coding time was split across Python, Markdown, JSON, TypeScript, and SQL, and he worked across 5 projects.
